ABOUT 
TOTALIS 

Enduring Beauty, Superior Functionality, & Unbeatable value.

Contact Us

About Totalis

Totalis is brought to you by Hindalco, created to deliver engineered aluminium doors and windows that offer exceptional performance and everyday value for modern Indian homes.

Born from the Aditya Birla Group's rich legacy, Totalis combines world-class aluminium expertise with design innovation to produce windows that are tested, trusted, and built to last.

Totalis draws its strength from Hindalco Industries Limited, one of the world's foremost aluminium producers and the largest recycler of aluminium globally.

As the flagship metals company of the Aditya Birla Group, Hindalco stands for innovation, sustainability, and trusted excellence, assuring that every Totalis product meets the highest global standards of quality and reliability.

Why Choose Totalis

Every Totalis window is designed to deliver enduring beauty, superior functionality, and unbeatable value. Our promise rests on four key pillars:

Tested & Certified

Rigorously tested for wind, water, and air performance to ensure unmatched durability and reliability.

Integrated Supply Chain

Seamless integration with Hindalco ensures consistent quality, operational efficiency, and on-time delivery.

Anti-Counterfeit Protection

Unique holograms and custom-designed handles safeguard authenticity and build customer confidence.

Optimized Pricing

Competitive pricing provides exceptional value without compromising quality or performance.

The Totalis Advantage

Precision-engineered aluminium windows that bring style, safety, and durability together, designed for India's diverse climate and daily living needs.

Precision Built

System-grade aluminium designed for lasting performance.

Made for Real Homes

Works perfectly for renovations, new constructions & boutique projects

Climate Ready

Insulates from weather, noise, dust and heat; with minimal upkeep requirements

Our Trusted Project

Let’s Discuss your Project with us

Contact Us

TOTALIS

Totalis by Hindalco Industries Limited supplies tested and certified aluminium extrusions and hardware components. Fabrication, assembling, installation, servicing, and warranty of the finished window system are the sole responsibility of the fabricator. Users acknowledge that their contractual relationship is with the fabricator. Please contact your fabricator for details on warranties and after-sales service
